The Angry Birds Movie 2 (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $41,657,076Details
International Box Office $110,598,112
Worldwide Box Office $152,255,188
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,176,067
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,220,660
Total $7,396,727
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When a new threat emerges that puts both Bird and Pig Island in danger, Red, Chuck, Bomb, and Mighty Eagle recruit Chuck’s sister Silver and team up with pigs Leonard, his assistant Courtney, and techpig Garry to forge an unsteady truce and form an unlikely superteam to save their homes.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,354,073 (24.9% of total gross)
Legs:4.02 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:27.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$65,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,869 opening theaters/3,869 max. theaters, 4.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $54,390,683

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 13th, 2019 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: August 2nd, 2019 (Wide), released as Angry Birds 2 (United Kingdom)
August 7th, 2019 (Wide) (South Korea)
August 7th, 2019 (Wide) (Iceland)
August 7th, 2019 (Wide) (Egypt)
August 8th, 2019 (Wide) (Hungary)
Video Release: October 29th, 2019 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
December 2nd, 2019 by Sony Pictures
MPA Rating: PG for rude humor and action.
(Rating bulletin 2583 (Cert #51937), 6/19/2019)
Running Time: 96 minutes
Franchise: Angry Birds
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead, Ensemble
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D
Plot point: Enemies Forced to Work Together, Talking Animals, War
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Based on Game
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Rovio Animation, Sony Pictures Animation
Production Countries: United States, Finland
Languages: English

Synopsis

When a new threat emerges that puts both Bird and Pig Island in danger, Red, Chuck, Bomb, and Mighty Eagle recruit Chuck’s sister Silver and team up with pigs Leonard, his assistant Courtney, and techpig Garry to forge an unsteady truce and form an unlikely superteam to save their homes.
